nasb.text: ‘Have you not heard? Long ago I did it; From ancient times I planned it. Now I have brought it to pass, That you should turn fortified cities into ruinous heaps.

esv.text: “Have you not heard that I determined it long ago? I planned from days of old what now I bring to pass, that you should turn fortified cities into heaps of ruins,

cnv.text: 你沒有聽過嗎？ 在遠古我已決定， 在古時我已籌劃， 現在我要實現， 就是你使設防城變成亂堆。

ccb.text: “‘难道你不知道这是我在太初所定、 在亘古就筹划好的吗？ 如今我实现了所定的计划—— 借着你使坚城沦为废墟。
